title: Build IQ1_S and IQ1_M quants for DeepSeek V4 Flash

history.note: Created. Hard prerequisite: v4-port-I-imatrix must be merged to feat/v4-port first (consumes tests/v4-port/calibration/imatrix-v4-flash.dat). Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-07-v4-imatrix-iq1-design.md. Plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-07-v4-port-J-iq1-quants.md. Phased plan: build IQ1_S (Q5_K output/embed pin, IQ1_S body) → validate via gate-loader/coherence/tools → build IQ1_M same recipe → validate → split shards → upload to teamblobfish/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-GGUF under IQ1_S/ and IQ1_M/ subdirs → update HF README. Fallback: if gate-tools fails at Q5_K pin, bump to Q6_K and rebuild; if still fails, declare unviable and ship as research artifact.
